blockingIssues.description: Route transitions in src/components/layout/page-transition.tsx always animate and do not gate on prefers-reduced-motion, so non-essential transitions still run for reduced-motion users (VAL-FOUND-020).

appliedUpdates.description: Added Node 18/Tailwind compatibility guidance to .factory/library/environment.md: keep Tailwind on 4.0.x in this environment because 4.1+ may require newer Node and can break install/build.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Relax mandatory agent-browser and strict TDD-first requirements for infrastructure-heavy scaffold tasks that are better validated via CLI, curl, and static checks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-scaffold review observed the current procedure was too rigid for setup work and the worker validated effectively with CLI/curl evidence.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify TDD expectations for UI features so compliance is measurable (for example, require new/updated tests before final validation, but do not require every session to prove a recorded red-phase for each UI interaction).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-layout-theme review noted implementation files were created before layout tests and no explicit failing phase was captured.
